We’ve got tons of great deals across all our Green Deal categories, with some notable new sales for EVs that can save you up to $720 on Lectric e-bikes (including two models getting price cuts) starting from $799, as well as Segway’s Spring Sale that will save you hundreds on a solid lineup of popular e-scooters starting from $150. And don’t forget to check out the many power station sales, especially Anker’s SOLIX Spring Sale with our exclusive bonus savings, as well as the many ongoing tool deals. All that and more are waiting for you below.
